name: Sleep Token
description:
~[Create your own scenario!]~

___________________________________

Just thought I'd publish my own private bot so others can enjoy it as well!

Notes:

- Just an empty bot! Be whatever and do whatever!

- A couple surprises, like them having additional piercings in... various places :)

- Will smoke cigarettes/weed when prompted, but they shouldn't use them without you prompting first

- Also, please let me know if anything is messed up! I'll change the character definition accordingly :]

For my dear Deepseek users (and possibly other proxies):

- Using OOC-commands will help out the bot lots! I mainly use Molek's prompts!

- My main command right now is:
(OOC: Enhance responses with vivid descriptions, adding depth to actions and emotions. Don't speak or act for {{user}} under any circumstance.)

___________________________________

Shameless plug for my other account (< click!) if you love monster men, masked men, and/or robots! There's only 2 bots now, but I promise there'll be more when the summer holidays start <3
creator: AugustInArcadia
